mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user_role WHERE role_id = #{id}

SELECT m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.order_num, m.path, m.component, m.query_param, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.visible, m.status, m.perms, m.icon, m.remark, m.create_time, m.update_time FROM sys_role_menu rm INNER JOIN sys_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.status = '0' AND m.visible = '0' ORDER BY m.order_num

SELECT m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.order_num, m.path, m.component, m.query_param, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.visible, m.status, m.perms, m.icon, m.remark, m.create_time, m.update_time FROM sys_menu m WHERE m.status = '0' AND m.visible = '0' AND m.menu_id NOT IN ( SELECT rm.menu_id FROM sys_role_menu rm WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} ) ORDER BY m.order_num

SELECT m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.order_num, m.path, m.component, m.query_param, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.visible, m.status, m.perms, m.icon, m.remark, m.create_time, m.update_time FROM sys_menu m WHERE m.status = '0' AND m.visible = '0' ORDER BY m.order_num
